description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Apply for a full-day nursery place for a 3-year-old within 3 km of home, starting in early September 2025, limiting the monthly fee to at most 600 and using sorting to choose and apply to the cheapest matching nursery.

tasks.instruction: Find nurseries in the Downtown district with ratings of at least 4.5 that open by 07:00, sort by earliest opening time, and save the earliest-opening nursery that matches these filters to favorites.

tasks.instruction: Book a visit next Wednesday morning between 09:00 and 11:00 at a nursery within 2 km that accepts 2-year-olds, has a large outdoor playground, and charges at most 550 per month, choosing the highest-rated option that has an available time slot.

tasks.instruction: Register a 4–5-year-old for two different afternoon activities in July 2025 that each cost at most 30 per session and are held at the same center, adding both sessions to the registration list.

tasks.instruction: Use the fee calculator to compare monthly costs for a 2-year-old from a household with monthly income around 3200 for half-day versus full-day schedules on 5 days per week, and save whichever schedule shows the lower monthly fee as the preferred plan.

tasks.instruction: Create an application for a 1-year-old in the North district that includes three full-day nurseries, sorted by rating from highest to lowest and ranked as preferences 1–3 in that order.
tasks.name: Create an application for a 1-year-old in the North district that includes three full-day nurseries, sorted by rating from highest to lowest and ranked as preferences 1–3 in that order.

tasks.instruction: Within 4 km of home, find a nursery that offers both nut-free menus and lactose-free options, open its details, and use the site’s contact form to send a message asking how they handle nut and lactose allergies there, including your contact information.

expected_values.mealsDescription: We provide a seasonal rotating menu prepared in a central municipal kitchen. All meals are nut-free, and lactose-free alternatives (plant-based milks and yogurts) are available on request.

tasks.instruction: From the closure calendar, select the first date after the mid-August 2025 holiday period that is not marked as closed, then start a new application for a 2-year-old in the East district with full-day care using that date as the desired start date.

expected_values.calendar_note: First day after summer break – regular service resumes.
